about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Crafting furniture that transforms houses into homes, one piece at a time

quote_section.quote: Furniture is more than wood and metal—it's the heart of a home, the silent witness to life's moments.

story_section.title: Our Story
story_section.subtitle: From Humble Beginnings to Global Reach
story_section.description_paragraph1: Bahadır's passion for furniture design began in a small workshop, where curiosity and creativity first took shape. Inspired by the timeless beauty of handcrafted pieces and the stories they hold, he set out to create furniture that marries form and function.
story_section.description_paragraph2: With a background in woodworking, Bahadır honed his skills, learning from master craftsmen and experimenting with innovative techniques. Each piece is a testament to his dedication to excellence.
story_section.description_paragraph3: Today, Monteri stands as a symbol of quality, creativity, and the enduring value of handmade furniture. From the first sketch to the final polish, every item is crafted with care.

mission_section.title: Our Mission
mission_section.mission_statement: At Monteri, our mission is to create furniture that inspires and endures. We believe in the power of thoughtful design, the beauty of natural materials, and the importance of craftsmanship.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We use only the finest materials and meticulous craftsmanship to ensure every piece meets our high standards.

innovation.description: Our designs blend classic techniques with modern aesthetics to create functional art for your home.

testimonials_section.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials_section.subtitle: Real stories from satisfied customers around the world
testimonials_section.feedback1: The service trolley I purchased from Monteri is not only beautiful but incredibly functional. It's become the centerpiece of my dining room!
testimonials_section.feedback2: I was looking for a unique coffee table, and the Zigon design exceeded all my expectations. The craftsmanship is outstanding!
testimonials_section.feedback3: I recently purchased a side table and it's the perfect addition to my living room. Beautifully crafted and very sturdy!
testimonials_section.feedback4: The service coffee table is both elegant and practical. It's a beautiful centerpiece that also offers great functionality.
testimonials_section.feedback5: I'm impressed with the quality of the materials used in the service trolley. It's clear that Monteri values craftsmanship.
testimonials_section.feedback6: The Zigon coffee tables are a conversation starter! They add a unique touch to my home decor and are very well-made.
